Event: Titanic Excavation - Dec 2024
Event Date: 27/12/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AR172
Forest Caster Gear

Once in a while, when a unit's health drops below 40%, they remove 4 random debuffs, restore 35% health, and increase damage, crit and physical armor piercing by 50% for 4 sec. Also during this time, the unit's attacks deal an additional pure damage equal to 10% of the target's max health.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
